Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old gang member comes to town.
Video.title: Preacher with a Past

Video.summary: Abel Duncan is dying, and his last request is for an ordained minister to preside over his funeral.
Video.title: Abel Duncan's Dying Wish

Video.summary: Sante Fe faces an invasion by the American army and it's citizens are forced south.
Video.title: La Tules

Video.summary: A criminal sentenced to hang invents a complicated omelet to delay his execution.
Video.title: The Hangtown Fry

Video.summary: Reuel Gridley pays off a bet by donating a bag of flour to a fund for the Civil War wounded.
Video.title: The $275,000 Sack of Flour

Video.summary: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
Video.title: The Hat That Wore the West

Image.alt: The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
Video.title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Image.alt: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Video.summary: A cowboy explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.
Video.title: Phantom Procession

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: Bill Franklin stumbles upon a rich gold vein and names it after his wife.
Video.title: The Holy Terror

Video.summary: The Dalton brothers stage simultaneous robberies of two banks in Coffeyville.
Video.title: Three Minutes to Eternity

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: Pearl Hart emigrates from Canada to commit the last stagecoach robbery in history.
Video.title: The Last Stagecoach Robbery

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him for secret government information.
Video.title: Matter of Honor

Video.summary: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.
Video.title: Fort Bowie: Urgent

Video.summary: Dr. Charles Edwards arrives in a rough frontier town to set up practice.
Video.title: Pioneer Doctor

Video.summary: A father outsmarts a wily Indian.
Video.title: The Lucky Cow

Video.summary: A pioneer fends off a trapper's persistent offers to buy the pioneer's Indian wife.
Video.title: From the Earth, a Heritage

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: Native prisoners slip away from their captors and return to the warpath armed with stolen rifles.
Video.title: The Journey

Video.summary: Newspaper editor Carolyn Romney launches a campaign against outlaws terrorizing Durango, Colorado.
Video.title: Mrs. Romney and the Outlaws

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: Sailor William Richardson falls in love with the Mexican comandante's daughter.
Video.title: The Water Bringer

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Billy the Kid sets out to avenge the death of friend John Tunstall.
Video.title: The Kid From Hell's Kitchen

Video.summary: A former cowhand shuns progress.
Video.title: A Wrangler's Last Ride

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A likable old miner starts losing friends when his luck takes a turn for the better.
Video.title: One Fast Injun

Video.summary: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.
Video.title: The Man Who Wouldn't Die

Video.summary: A rancher fights bandits.
Video.title: The Trouble with Taxes
